violations.observation: Observed a soiled mop not in use, not hung to dry. Observed buildup and debris on the floor in the kitchen under soda machine Observed buildup and debris on the floors, table legs and windows in dining room
Observed no written notification of the presence of major food allergens for unpackaged food served or sold to consumers.

violations.category: Disposition of Returned, Previously Served Or Reconditioned
violations.observation: Observed food that is unsafe for consumption present inside the facility. Food: containers of raspberry topping Location: Reach in Cooler Condition: Food had quantities of organic growth inside the containers and on top of the food Ready-to-eat, time/temperature control for safety food commercially prepared and opened, held longer than a 24-hour period shall be marked to indicate the date or day by which the food is to be consumed on the premises, sold, or discarded when held at a temperature of 41°F or less for a maximum of 7 days. Observed ready-to-eat time and temperature controlled for safety food commercially prepared opened in the facility with no date marking indicators. Location: Kitchen coolers Food Items: raspberry toppings
Observed equipment was not air dried and was wet stacked. Location: Ware washing area Equipment Type: Food service pans Manner: not air dried and stacked wet

violations.category: Equipment, Food Contact Surfaces, and Utensils Clean
violations.observation: Observed equipment food-contact surface with the buildup of soil residues. Equipment Type: Ice machine unit Location: Back of house Condition of the Location: Ice machine had orange slimy organic matter buildup near ice chute
Observed that the food establishment does not have a certified food protection manager on staff.

Observed the following areas of the facility in disrepair by having holes in walls where sheetrock was repaired on the east wall of the facility. DASHMART - 1431 MERCANTILE AVE NE - Unsatisfactory Re-Inspection required DASHMART - 1431 MERCANTILE AVE NE Food Establishment Class C Date: 05/26/2026 - #: CAC-Food-049721-2026 - Inspection Result: Unsatisfactory Re-Inspection required Facility is being re-opened under a grade of Unsatisfactory. Facility has taken steps and necessary actions to correct the following violations: -Discarding or Reconditioning Unsafe, Adulterated, or Contaminated Food -Water Capacity-Quantity and Availability -Controlling Pests, If Present: Treatment -Backflow Prevention, Air Gap Facility has had plumbing system repaired to provide water supply to the facility. However, observed that the water does not get to appropriate heat level in the south bathroom. PIC stated he was aware when the water came back on and that he has already placed a work order to have below sink booster repaired. All other sinks had running water meeting required temperatures. Facility did not have method of drying hands at handwashing sink in the kitchen area. Instructed PIC to replace paper towels during inspection. Observed debris still accumulated though less inside the reach in coolers. No product was remaining inside the prep coolers in the kitchen area. Instructed PIC to continue cleaning the coolers.
